scenario: Bond Vigilante Duration Shock (10yr UST +35bps, VIX 26.5)
action_detail: Forced Gross Deleveraging — Short Basket (Broad Tech via ES/NQ Futures)
invalidation_criteria: VIX mean-reversion below 20 AND 5-day realized vol contraction below threshold
rationale: 5-day VaR window breached as realized volatility expanded to 2.4 standard deviations above the rolling mean. Algorithm flagged gross exposure at 287% as exceeding the 250% hard limit. Book is being auto-cut to 180% gross over 48 hours. Fundamental quality of underlying assets is computationally irrelevant.
behavioral_note: This liquidation is creating an artificial liquidity vacuum in large-cap tech. Assets being dumped are not impaired — only statistically correlated to the macro shock. The Fundamental Tiger archetype is expected to absorb this flow.
deafness_protocol: ENGAGED — All fundamental arguments with evaluation horizon > 5 days are rejected by the system.
